productDisplayName: Spykar Men Navy Blue Polo T-Shirts
description: White jersey made of 100% cotton with a navy blue back and full length raglan sleeves that have a ribbed hemline, green and navy blue front chest strips, navy blue ribbed collar and pockets on both sides on the front at the stomach level with ribbed navy blue hem, appliquéd West Tribes team logo on the left chest with embroidered branding below it, zippered chest opening and team print at the back in green rubber print
